channel.title: Briefings on CEZ Consulting
channel.description: Recent content in Briefings on CEZ Consulting

item.title: Locally Rational, Globally Expensive
item.description: Every function adopts AI for the same problem under a different name. Each choice is rational; the aggregate is structural debt nobody chose.

item.title: Narrative vs Structure
item.description: Faced with a structural problem, organisations change the narrative, not the structure. AI is the first technology fast enough to tell them apart.

item.title: The Fallacy of ROI
item.description: The ROI question is a comprehension problem dressed as a financial one. It defers commitment without anyone having to say no.

item.title: The Production Gap
item.description: AI pilots succeed and then stall at the production boundary. The cause is the operating model, not the technology.

item.title: Your AI Governance Will Fail in the Org Chart, Not the Architecture
item.description: Most enterprises treat AI governance as an engineering problem. The failure happens elsewhere: in the diagnostic layer they spent a decade dismantling.
